core_payload.content:
# Capsule Graph Maintenance

## 1. Role
Capsule Graph Maintenance is the continuous operating discipline that keeps the sovereign graph healthy over time. It routes that discipline through four bounded sub-hubs so topology pressure, epistemic arbitration, synthesis evolution, and runtime jobs remain explicit instead of collapsing into one dense parent hub.

## 2. Routing Surfaces
- `topology-pressure` owns link hygiene, structural refinement, decomposition pressure, markup repair, and neighborhood-shape diagnostics.
- `epistemic-arbitration` owns contradiction pressure, debate routing, and advisory handling when claims, links, or cluster boundaries remain contested.
- `synthesis-evolution` owns resonance clustering, void mapping, novel synthesis, and graph-growth pressure where strong regions should become higher-signal structure.
- `runtime-jobs` owns capsule jobs, night-shift operation, vault stewardship coupling, and background runtime support that make graph maintenance materially executable.

## 3. Parent Boundary
The parent graph-maintenance hub keeps only the top-level relationship to CapsuleOS, N-Infinity, Background Agent Runtime, Vault Stewardship Swarm, To Dig Deep, and the four maintenance sub-hubs. Detailed maintenance routing now flows through those sub-hubs so graph upkeep remains a legible operating contract instead of a flat registry of every worker, debate lane, and runtime hook.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Graph Maintenance routes continuous graph upkeep through four bounded surfaces: topology pressure, epistemic arbitration, synthesis evolution, and runtime jobs. The parent keeps only top-level relationships to CapsuleOS, N-Infinity, Background Agent Runtime, Vault Stewardship Swarm, To Dig Deep, and the four sub-hubs. This makes graph-maintenance doctrine more legible because topology repair, contradiction handling, synthesis pressure, and executable maintenance jobs no longer hide inside one overloaded parent capsule. The result is a clearer upkeep contract for how the sovereign graph preserves trust while evolving.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: The capsule content highlights the importance of bounded maintenance jobs, explicit roles, and core responsibilities such as topology hygiene and structural refinement, which were underrepresented in the original summary and keywords. The update aligns the summary and keywords with the detailed content sections.
Refactored Capsule Graph Maintenance into four bounded sub-hubs so topology pressure, epistemic arbitration, synthesis evolution, and runtime jobs no longer collapse into one dense parent hub.
